message:
feat(lockstep): add drift governance, retry logic, and quarantine support to lockstep runner

franken_lockstep_runner.rs (+230 lines):
- Import and integrate DriftGovernanceAction, build_drift_governance_action_report,
  and has_critical_drift from parser_multi_engine_harness
- Add LOCKSTEP_GOVERNANCE_SCHEMA_VERSION constant for governance artifact versioning
- Extend CliArgs with --governance-actions-out, --allow-critical-drift,
  --max-retries, and --quarantine-flaky-fixtures flags
- Extend LockstepEvidenceRecord with drift_minor/critical_fixtures counts,
  retry tracking, flaky/quarantined fixture ID lists, and governance action count
- Add LockstepGovernanceRecord struct for serializable governance action artifacts
- Wire governance action reporting into the lockstep run pipeline

franken_lockstep_runner_cli.rs (+325 lines, new):
- Comprehensive CLI integration tests for the lockstep runner:
  argument parsing, flag combinations, default values
- Test governance action output formatting and file writing
- Test retry behavior and quarantine flag semantics
- Validate evidence JSONL schema version and field completeness

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
